name: GooGooRise
short_description: Reaching the top is just the beginning. Don't fear failure, you can always start over. Climb upwards with all you've got!
detailed_description:
GooGooRisea 2D pixel art game that challenges your skills and reflexes. In this world, you control a tenacious slime that climbs and navigates through perilous levels by shooting out its tentacles. Only the most determined players will reach the top and claim victory!

Features:


Control your slime to shoot tentacles, sticking to walls, ceilings, or any climbable surface. Utilize the physics engine to precisely adjust the direction and force of the tentacles for optimal climbing.

Unique Levels


Each level is filled with unique challenges and traps. Various deadly obstacles await you. Every move must be carefully calculated, as one mistake can send you back to the start.

Powerful Enemies


Besides static traps, various enemies will obstruct your progress. Each has its own unique attack patterns and behaviors, requiring flexible responses.

Pixel Art Style


The retro pixel art style combined with modern game mechanics brings a perfect blend of nostalgia and innovation. Every detail is meticulously crafted to create a unique and captivating game world.

Challenge Yourself


The game's difficulty increases progressively, with each level being a severe test of your skills. Only through constant attempts and failures will you master the techniques and ultimately overcome all challenges.

Are You Ready to Face the Challenge?


Enter the world of GooGoo Rise and experience an unprecedented climbing adventure. Let's see if you can be the one to reach the top successfully!
